remarks: NEW CONSTRUCTION-READY FOR MOVE-IN! Privately set at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac in the coveted Long Lots neighborhood, this 2.3-acre, flat, tree-lined property offers a rare combination of privacy and endless possibilities for creating a luxury compound. Introducing a truly exceptional estate by award-winning Builder, Westport Family Homes. The residence spans 9,062 sq. ft. with 6 bedrooms and 8 bathrooms, showcasing exceptional craftsmanship, thoughtful design, and high-end finishes throughout. Elevator ready, which enhances both convenience and long-term livability. At the heart of the home, a designer kitchen is complemented by a fully equipped scullery, offering a discreet secondary workspace for catering, entertaining and daily organization-an increasingly sought after feature in today's luxury homes. Outdoor living is equally impressive, with a resort-style saltwater pool and integrated spa, automatic safety cover, expansive covered and open-air patios, and an outdoor kitchen, designed for sophisticated entertaining. The property also offers ample space for a tennis court and guest house, further elevating its estate-like appeal. Additional highlights include a full-house generator, EV charging outlet, and the signature craftsmanship and attention to detail that define a Westport Family Homes build. A masterfully built home - designed to impress, built to last, and created for an exceptional lifestyle.
